title: Nullscape Panorama
description: Replaces the main menu panorama with that of the Nullscape End dimension.
body:
Replaces the default panorama with one taken with the [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) datapack. Also includes the End Lighthouse from [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), as well as the [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) mod and [Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shader.


![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb7057758edd57ea2ce4937eb53cf5e0a7a0a274_0.webp)
